name: Paneer Butter Masala
ingredients: Paneer, Butter, Tomato, Cream, Onion, Garlic, Ginger, Spices
instructions: 1. Fry onions until golden. 2. Add ginger-garlic paste. 3. Add tomatoes and cook until soft. 4. Add spices and cream. 5. Add paneer cubes. 6. Simmer for 5 minutes. 7. Garnish with butter and serve hot.

name: Aloo Gobi
ingredients: Potato, Cauliflower, Onion, Tomato, Turmeric, Cumin, Spices
instructions: 1. Chop potatoes and cauliflower. 2. Heat oil and add cumin seeds. 3. Add onions and cook. 4. Add tomatoes and spices. 5. Add vegetables and cook covered. 6. Serve hot with roti.

name: Dal Tadka
ingredients: Lentils, Ghee, Garlic, Onion, Tomato, Cumin, Turmeric, Spices
instructions: 1. Boil lentils with turmeric. 2. Heat ghee in pan. 3. Add cumin and garlic. 4. Add onions and tomatoes. 5. Pour tadka over dal. 6. Mix and serve with rice.

name: Chicken Curry
ingredients: Chicken, Onion, Tomato, Yogurt, Ginger, Garlic, Spices, Oil
instructions: 1. Marinate chicken with yogurt and spices. 2. Fry onions until brown. 3. Add ginger-garlic paste. 4. Add tomatoes and cook. 5. Add chicken and cook until done. 6. Garnish with coriander.

name: Vegetable Biryani
ingredients: Rice, Mixed Vegetables, Onion, Yogurt, Mint, Saffron, Spices
instructions: 1. Soak rice for 30 minutes. 2. Fry onions until crispy. 3. Layer rice and vegetables. 4. Add saffron milk and mint. 5. Cook on low heat for 20 minutes. 6. Serve with raita.

name: Palak Paneer
ingredients: Spinach, Paneer, Onion, Tomato, Cream, Garlic, Ginger, Spices
instructions: 1. Blanch spinach and make puree. 2. Fry onions and tomatoes. 3. Add ginger-garlic paste. 4. Add spinach puree and spices. 5. Add paneer cubes. 6. Add cream and simmer.

name: Chole Bhature
ingredients: Chickpeas, Onion, Tomato, Ginger, Garlic, Spices, Flour, Yogurt
instructions: 1. Soak chickpeas overnight. 2. Pressure cook with spices. 3. Make gravy with onions and tomatoes. 4. Mix chickpeas with gravy. 5. Make dough with flour and yogurt. 6. Deep fry bhature and serve.

name: Rajma Masala
ingredients: Kidney Beans, Onion, Tomato, Ginger, Garlic, Cream, Spices
instructions: 1. Soak rajma overnight. 2. Pressure cook until soft. 3. Fry onions and tomatoes. 4. Add ginger-garlic paste and spices. 5. Add cooked rajma. 6. Simmer and add cream.

name: Egg Curry
ingredients: Eggs, Onion, Tomato, Coconut Milk, Curry Leaves, Spices
instructions: 1. Boil eggs and peel. 2. Fry onions until golden. 3. Add tomatoes and spices. 4. Add coconut milk. 5. Add boiled eggs. 6. Simmer for 10 minutes.

name: Masala Dosa
ingredients: Rice, Lentils, Potato, Onion, Mustard Seeds, Curry Leaves, Turmeric
instructions: 1. Soak rice and lentils. 2. Grind to make batter. 3. Ferment overnight. 4. Make potato filling with spices. 5. Spread batter on hot griddle. 6. Add filling and fold.

name: Sambar
ingredients: Lentils, Vegetables, Tamarind, Sambar Powder, Mustard Seeds, Curry Leaves
instructions: 1. Cook lentils until soft. 2. Boil vegetables. 3. Add tamarind water and sambar powder. 4. Mix lentils and vegetables. 5. Temper with mustard seeds. 6. Serve hot with rice.

name: Butter Chicken
ingredients: Chicken, Butter, Cream, Tomato, Cashew, Ginger, Garlic, Spices
instructions: 1. Marinate chicken with yogurt. 2. Grill or fry chicken. 3. Make gravy with tomatoes and cashews. 4. Add cream and butter. 5. Add chicken pieces. 6. Simmer and serve.

name: Pav Bhaji
ingredients: Mixed Vegetables, Butter, Onion, Tomato, Pav Bhaji Masala, Bread
instructions: 1. Boil and mash vegetables. 2. Fry onions and tomatoes. 3. Add pav bhaji masala. 4. Mix mashed vegetables. 5. Add butter generously. 6. Serve with toasted pav.

name: Tandoori Chicken
ingredients: Chicken, Yogurt, Lemon, Ginger, Garlic, Tandoori Masala, Oil
instructions: 1. Make marinade with yogurt and spices. 2. Marinate chicken for 4 hours. 3. Preheat oven to 200C. 4. Arrange chicken on tray. 5. Bake for 30 minutes. 6. Serve with mint chutney.

name: Veg Pulao
ingredients: Rice, Mixed Vegetables, Onion, Ghee, Cumin, Bay Leaf, Spices
instructions: 1. Soak rice for 20 minutes. 2. Heat ghee and add whole spices. 3. Fry onions. 4. Add vegetables and rice. 5. Add water and cook. 6. Serve hot with raita.

name: Paneer Tikka
ingredients: Paneer, Bell Pepper, Onion, Yogurt, Ginger, Garlic, Tikka Masala
instructions: 1. Cut paneer and vegetables. 2. Make marinade with yogurt and spices. 3. Marinate for 2 hours. 4. Thread on skewers. 5. Grill or bake until charred. 6. Serve with chutney.

name: Khichdi
ingredients: Rice, Lentils, Ghee, Cumin, Turmeric, Ginger, Vegetables
instructions: 1. Wash rice and lentils. 2. Heat ghee and add cumin. 3. Add ginger and vegetables. 4. Add rice and lentils. 5. Add water and pressure cook. 6. Serve with pickle.

name: Malai Kofta
ingredients: Paneer, Potato, Cashew, Cream, Onion, Tomato, Spices
instructions: 1. Mash paneer and potato. 2. Make kofta balls and fry. 3. Make gravy with onions and tomatoes. 4. Add cashew paste and cream. 5. Add koftas to gravy. 6. Serve hot.

name: Idli Sambar
ingredients: Rice, Lentils, Vegetables, Tamarind, Sambar Powder, Mustard Seeds
instructions: 1. Soak rice and lentils. 2. Grind and ferment batter. 3. Steam idlis. 4. Make sambar with vegetables. 5. Temper with mustard seeds. 6. Serve idli with sambar.

name: Poha
ingredients: Flattened Rice, Onion, Potato, Peanuts, Curry Leaves, Turmeric, Mustard Seeds
instructions: 1. Rinse poha and drain. 2. Heat oil and add mustard seeds. 3. Add peanuts and curry leaves. 4. Add onions and potatoes. 5. Add poha and turmeric. 6. Serve with lemon.
